'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 14''' is the fourteenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Released in Summer [[1991]], issue 14 represented a major departure from the magazine's regular quarterly publication schedule. It was the only ''Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' issue published that year, between the Fall [[1990]] release of [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 13|issue 13]] and the Winter [[1992]] release of [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 15|issue 15]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"[[The "Force" Strikes Back In New Nintendo Form!|The 'Force' Strikes Back In New Nintendo Form!]]" by [[Pamela Roller]]
*"[[Billy Dee Williams]]: The Life and Times of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]" by [[Dan Madsen]]
*"''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' — The Making of a Novel" by [[John S. Davis]]
*"The [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] FX Team"
*"Coming Soon: ''The Young Indiana Jones Chronicles''"
*"[[Lucasfilm]] Trivia" by [[Don Bies]] and [[Adam Schultz]]
